title: TRAVEL WITH JOE — Joe peeking from carry bag at landmark
prompt: the Roman Colosseum in soft background. @young_Papa and @young_Mama walking together at a sunny European piazza, soft pet carrier bag over her shoulder. @Joe fluffy face PEEKS OUT from the top of the carrier, tongue OUT panting happy, ears PERK UP. Like a tiny travel mascot. Hand PETS through the carrier opening from the partner. young_Mama (delighted): "Joe loves Rome!" Absolutely NO dialogue, NO voices, NO speech in any language. Only soft music and ambient sound effects (footsteps, leaves, distant traffic). NO foreign-language babble.
